title: OASIS 3.0.15
release_notes:
FIXES

· SWIFT OAS: Bad Request examples and sandbox extensions are removed from SWIFT outputs, including API Portal-ready mode.

· Create Template from OAS saves and reuses selected Service metadata.

· SWIFT server rows keep expected $index.xlsx styling.

NEW FEATURES

· Preferences: SWIFT servers can be configured by service.

· Default services: B2B, CGS, CGS-DKK, COR, FPAD, R2P, RT1, and SCT.

· Template Metadata: Service selection added for conversions and OAS import.

IMPROVEMENTS

· Generated templates receive the selected SWIFT server rows in $index.xlsx.

· OAS generation can update templates without SWIFT server rows.

· Conversion and template import logs are less noisy.
